title: PDF Maker - Automate Documents with Powerful PDF Creation Using monday app
excerpt: Hi all, we’re excited to announce a brand-new version of PDF Maker, designed to make document creation even more seamless with monday.com! This update introduces enhanced features that will streamline your workflow and o…

posts.author: bustbrainlabs (BustBrain Labs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, we’re excited to announce a brand-new version of PDF Maker, designed to make document creation even more seamless with monday.com! This update introduces enhanced features that will streamline your workflow and offer more flexibility in generating PDF & word documents.

Here’s what’s new:

  • Automate Documents: Use monday Automations to generate documents automatically.
  • Subitems Support: Include subitems in your documents as tables.
  • Word & Google Docs Support: Import your own documents and work with existing Word and Google Docs.
  • Output as Word and PDF: Export your documents as Word or PDF files.
  • Dynamic Images Support: Use images directly from your board.
  • PDF Preview: You can now preview PDFs directly within the app without it counting toward your document quota.

Want to see it in action? Watch our demo video here or or install the app PDF Maker - Automate Documents to test it yourself.

As always, feel free to reach out with any questions!
